narrative: Hopes for a US-Iran peace deal and the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz drive a sharp risk-on rotation, weighing on the dollar as crude prices retreat toward $90. AUD/USD firms at 0.7262 on the geopolitical thaw and a hawkish RBA bias, while NZD leads the G8 (+0.88%) on RBNZ hike expectations. Gold higher +1.05% near $4,744; equities +1.46%; DXY -0.19%; VIX 17.5. Watch RBNZ policy meeting on May 27 for further kiwi direction.
